statement: In every magma, Equation 3205 (`x = (((y * z) * y) * w) * x`) implies Equation 571 (`x = y * (z * (z * (x * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0457
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) y) w) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op z (op x x))))
